case_title: SANCHEZ PACHECO, PEDRO MAGDANIELD VS MAYORGA, ESTEBAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,250.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ PACHECO, PEDRO MAGDANIELD AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, ESTEBAN RADZIVILOVSKY, ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAYORGA, ESTEBAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RADZIVILOVSKY, ALEXANDER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ PACHECO, PEDRO MAGDANIELD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYORGA, ESTEBAN $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,920.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, ALEXANDER RADZIVILOVSKY. PLAINTIFF IS TO RETURN THE KEYS AND TITLE TO THE 1988 ACURA TO ESTEBAN MAYORGA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
